Unknown or unidentifiable shipments arriving without paperwork or PO match.

C001.text: Good morning everyone. Quick plant-wide note: we are actively managing a *Critical* NCR (NCR-MER-2026-0247) involving quarantined safety-critical AX/FG parts from Lakewood. Supply chain and Quality are on it. I'll provide an update at EOD. In the meantime, please direct any questions about AX part availability to Elizabeth or Kay — not directly to Production.
Welcome to the team communication board! Reminder that all receiving discrepancies go to #quality-ncr and all dock scheduling questions go to #dock-schedule. :truck:

C002.text:
:clipboard: *Dock Sheet — Monday April 14, 2026*

Today's appointments:
• APPT-20260414-001 | Dock 2 | 07:00 | Lakewood Precision / XPO — AX/FG safety-critical (DTL, COC+MTR required) :warning:
• APPT-20260414-002 | Dock 1 | 08:00 | Hartwell Bearing / Old Dominion — BG/SL parts
• APPT-20260414-003 | Dock 4 | 10:00 | Meridian Lube / local — *HAZMAT* UN1268 Class 3 :biohazard_sign:
• APPT-20260414-004 | Dock 2 | 11:00 | Lakewood Precision / XPO — DTL :rotating_light: (see separate thread)
• APPT-20260414-005 | Dock 3 | 11:00 | Appalachian Seal / UPS — *NEW SUPPLIER* 100% inspection required :new:

Curtis on inspection today. Darnell managing floor. @m.ortiz standing by for Dock 4 hazmat.
:truck: REC-20260414-001 OPEN — Lakewood Precision / XPO arrived Dock 2 at 06:48. 12 pallets, 4,680 lb. PO MER-PO-104821. Safety-critical AX/FG lines. Curtis beginning count + doc check.
Count in progress on AX-04827-B2 — looks like we have 44 not 48. Double-checking.

Confirmed: 44 units of AX-04827-B2 (−4 short). AX-05512-C1 exact at 96. FG-91144-A1 exact at 200. 

:red_circle: *DOC CHECK: MTR present, COC MISSING.* Packing slip says "COC will follow by email." Flagging Kay.

:rotating_light: *COC MISSING — QUARANTINE INITIATED* per SOP Sec 12.5.1. All 340 units of REC-20260414-001 going to Q-HOLD. NCR-MER-2026-0247 issued (Critical). Notifying Theo + Joon-ho. Formal notice to Lakewood going out shortly.
Copy. Q-HOLD labels on all 3 pallets, staged in Q-HOLD zone. Nothing moves without Kay's say-so.
:truck: REC-20260414-002 OPEN — Hartwell Bearing / Old Dominion arrived Dock 1 at 08:30. PO MER-PO-104835. BG-33044-A1 (144 units) + SL-10922-B1 (300 pcs, PO qty 288). Curtis on inspection.

:warning: *Tier 2 damage on BG-33044-A1.* Found 11 of 144 bearings with impact dents on outer race — opening boxes 3, 7, and 11 shows it most clearly. Consistent with clamp damage in transit. Photographing now. Safety-critical part. Flagging for quarantine.
Also: SL-10922-B1 over-ship — 300 received vs 288 PO qty (+12). Tier 0 condition, docs complete. Band B over-ship. Flagging Joon-ho for disposition.

BG lot quarantined — NCR-MER-2026-0248 issued (Major, DMG). Theo inspection request sent. SL excess 12 units staged in B-RCV-01 — NCR-MER-2026-0249 issued (Minor, QTY). Joon-ho notified for disposition.
BG pallet in Q-HOLD zone, SL 288 units moved to B-RCV-01, excess 12 staged separately with Over-Ship tag.

:biohazard_sign: REC-20260414-003 COMPLETE — Meridian Lube arrived Dock 4 at 10:12. 4 drums LB-55001-A2 (UN1268 Class 3). Count exact, Tier 0 condition, SDS Rev 4 on file. Chris Wojciechowski notified per #hazmat-safety. Transferred to hazmat cage Zone C. No issues. See #hazmat-safety for Maribel's sign-off.

:new: REC-20260414-005 COMPLETE — Appalachian Seal & Gasket (new supplier) arrived Dock 3 at 11:20. 100% inspection performed per SOP Sec 15.2.3. Standard SL seals only — no SC exposure. Count exact, Tier 0, COC + SDS present. Put away B-RCV-01. Clean first delivery! :white_check_mark:

:moon: *EOD Receiving Summary — April 14, 2026*

:white_check_mark: REC-20260414-003 — Meridian Lube LB drums — COMPLETE
:white_check_mark: REC-20260414-005 — Appalachian Seal (new) — COMPLETE
:red_circle: REC-20260414-001 — Lakewood AX/FG — *QUARANTINE* (missing COC, NCR-0247 Critical)
:orange_circle: REC-20260414-002 — Hartwell BG/SL — *QUARANTINE* (Tier 2 damage, NCR-0248 Major) + excess SL staged (NCR-0249)

Open action: COC due from Lakewood by 04/21 17:00 CST.

:truck: REC-20260420-001 COMPLETE — Cascade Fastener balance shipment for NCR-MER-2026-0241. 17 units FS-22801-A3 received, count exact. 100% inspection performed (probation supplier). COC + MTR verified. Put away A-RCV-01.

:clipboard: *Dock Sheet — Thursday April 23, 2026*

Today's expected:
• MER-PO-104874 L001 balance — 12x TR-67801-D1 from GreatLakes / FedEx Freight (PRO FXF-2026-88142) — COC pre-received from Kevin Baxter ✅
• APPT-20260415-001 carryover — Delta Metals / Estes — oversize/heavy, crane at Dock 2 (Darnell confirmed)

:red_circle: REC-20260414-001 (Lakewood AX/FG) still on Q-HOLD — COC now *9 days overdue*. NCR-MER-2026-0247 CRITICAL/OVERDUE. Escalated to Walter + Elizabeth. Formal demand email sent 07:00.

:truck: *NO-APPOINTMENT ARRIVAL* — Yellow Freight truck just pulled in, no dock number, says they're delivering TR-67801-D1 for MER-PO-104874. I've got them holding at the entrance per SOP Sec 8.6 — not letting them back in until Kay clears it. @k.whitfield heads up.

Kay — sent you an email with the formal release authorization for the BG-33044-A1 bearings from REC-20260414-002. Inspected them this morning and they look good to me. Check your inbox when you get a chance.

C003.text:
:rotating_light: *NCR-MER-2026-0247 ISSUED — CRITICAL*

*Supplier:* Lakewood Precision Forgings (SUP-0012)
*PO:* MER-PO-104821 | *Receipt:* REC-20260414-001
*Type:* Documentation Deficiency + Quantity Variance
*SKUs:* AX-04827-B2 (44 rcvd, 48 ordered), AX-05512-C1 (96), FG-91144-A1 (200)
*Issue:* COC missing on safety-critical AX/FG receipt. Packing slip says "will follow by email."
*Status:* Full receipt QUARANTINED per SOP Sec 12.5.1
*COC Due:* April 21, 2026 at 17:00 CST (5 business days)
*Assigned QE:* @t.brandt

Formal Template 10 letter sent to Lakewood.

Acknowledged — quarantine confirmed. I've got the receipt in the NCR log. I'll stand by for the COC; once it arrives I'll verify against the MTR heat numbers (HT-2026-1184, HT-2026-1185, HT-2026-0997) and give Kay written sign-off.
Noted on NCR-0247. I'll keep a hold flag on MER-PO-104918 (the Lakewood DTL order) until this is resolved.
Lakewood (Mark Hendricks) acknowledged via email — said Sandra Chu will provide COC "within 2 business days." That's by 04/16. We'll see.

:orange_circle: *NCR-MER-2026-0248 ISSUED — MAJOR*

*Supplier:* Hartwell Bearing Technologies (SUP-0034)
*PO:* MER-PO-104835 | *Receipt:* REC-20260414-002
*Type:* Damage — Transit (Tier 2)
*SKU:* BG-33044-A1 — 11 of 144 units with outer race impact dents
*Safety-Critical:* Yes (BG family)
*Status:* Full BG lot QUARANTINED pending QE inspection
*Supplier Response Due:* April 28, 2026 (10 business days)
*Assigned QE:* @t.brandt

Formal notice + Curtis's damage report sent to Hartwell.

On it. I'll schedule the bearing inspection for tomorrow morning (04/15). Curtis's photos are in `photos/MER-PO-104835_20260414/` — already reviewed them. Classic clamp damage. I expect to condemn at least 3 outright.

Inspection complete on BG-33044-A1 damage (NCR-0248). Results:
• 8 of 11: shallow outer race dents — condemned for production, set aside for carrier claim
• 3 of 11: deep raceway damage — condemn immediately, do not return to supply chain
• 133 undamaged units: recommend release once NCR is closed out

Written QE assessment uploaded to quality_docs. Notified Kay. Carrier liability likely.

:white_circle: *NCR-MER-2026-0249 ISSUED — MINOR*

*Supplier:* Hartwell Bearing Technologies (SUP-0034)
*PO:* MER-PO-104835 | *Receipt:* REC-20260414-002
*Type:* Quantity — Over-ship Band B
*SKU:* SL-10922-B1 — 300 received vs 288 ordered (+12 units)
*Status:* 288 units accepted to B-RCV-01; 12 excess staged pending @j.park disposition
*Supplier Response Due:* May 5, 2026 (15 business days)

Not a safety issue — standard part, clean condition.

:orange_circle: *NCR-MER-2026-0241 ISSUED — MAJOR* (Probation floor elevation)

*Supplier:* Cascade Fastener Corp (SUP-0051, *PROBATION*)
*PO:* MER-PO-104847 | *Receipt:* REC-20260412-001
*Type:* Quantity — Short-ship Band 1
*SKU:* FS-22801-A3 — 483 received vs 500 ordered (−17, −3.4%). Safety-critical bolt.
*Note:* Probation supplier → severity floor Major per SOP Sec 14.3.3 + 15.2.2. 100% inspection performed.
*Supplier Response Due:* May 2, 2026 (15 business days, Major NCR)

Cascade acknowledged via email 04/14 — balance 17 units shipping 04/17.

:alarm_clock: *NCR-MER-2026-0247 ESCALATED — DEADLINE MISSED*

Lakewood has not provided the COC for REC-20260414-001 by the 17:00 CST deadline today (April 21). This is the 5-business-day window per SOP Sec 12.5.1.

@w.finch has been notified. @j.park please place informal hold on new PO releases to Lakewood. @k.whitfield please send formal past-due notice.

Material (AX-04827-B2 x44, AX-05512-C1 x96, FG-91144-A1 x200) remains on Q-HOLD.
Hold placed on Lakewood PO releases. MER-PO-104918 (DTL line) flagged in the system.
Agreed on escalation. If the COC doesn't arrive by end of this week I'll initiate a supplier capability review per Walter's direction.

:envelope: Hartwell CAR received for NCR-MER-2026-0248. Summary: OD carrier liability confirmed (freight claim #ODG-2026-04812 filed). Revised load instructions issued. Hartwell offering 11 replacement BG-33044-A1 units. CAR looks acceptable. Will review formally and recommend close once procurement authorizes replacement shipment.

133 undamaged units still on quarantine — pending NCR close-out.

:red_circle: *NCR-MER-2026-0247 STATUS — April 23 (Day 9)*

COC still not received. Lakewood blamed ERP migration (04/22 email from Mark Hendricks). Formal demand with 12:00 CST today deadline sent this morning.

Aditi flagging potential line-down on Assembly Line 1 within 5 business days. Walter aware. Elizabeth coordinating on alternative sourcing.

Anyone who gets a direct call or message from Lakewood re: this COC — please loop me in immediately.

C004.text: FYI — per Walter's direction this morning, @j.park has placed an informal hold on MER-PO-104918 (Lakewood DTL line) pending resolution of NCR-MER-2026-0247. No new Lakewood releases until the COC situation is resolved.
Confirmed — hold placed. Also, MER-PO-104874 (GreatLakes balance TR-67801-D1 x12) is due today via FedEx Freight. COC pre-received from Kevin Baxter this morning. Dock 1 is clear for the delivery.
Also confirmed: 12 excess SL-10922-B1 from NCR-MER-2026-0249 — accepted and PO amendment issued to MER-PO-104835 Line 002. New auth qty 300. Inventory master updated.

:warning: Flagging for awareness: if NCR-0247 (Lakewood COC) is not resolved by end of this week, I'm going to open a conversation with Ridgeline Precision Axles (SUP-0157) about an emergency AX-04827-B2 order. They're our backup SC axle supplier. @j.park please get me current Ridgeline lead times.
On it — I'll pull Ridgeline's current lead time from the supplier master and check if they have AX-04827-B2 in stock. Will have an answer within the hour.

C005.text:
:warning: *Material Alert — Assembly Line 1*

REC-20260414-001 (Lakewood AX/FG) is on Q-HOLD due to missing COC. This affects our AX-04827-B2 stock. Current usable on-hand: *0 units* (all 44 from this receipt are quarantined). We have zero safety stock from prior receipts at this point.

*Line 1 at risk of stoppage by April 28 if quarantine is not released.*

@k.whitfield what's the latest on the COC timeline?

Lakewood says COC "by today or tomorrow" — Sandra Chu committed to EOD April 17. SOP deadline is April 21. Best case: material released by April 21–22. I'll update you the moment the COC hits my inbox.
Aditi — I'm monitoring this closely. If it goes past April 21, I have a backup plan with Ridgeline. Keep scheduling through April 25 for now.
Acknowledged Aditi. Elizabeth — please expedite the Ridgeline inquiry. Kay — what's the status of your 12:00 deadline to Lakewood?

C006.text:
:biohazard_sign: *Hazmat Pre-Arrival Notice — April 14*

Meridian Lube Supply (SUP-0067) inbound tomorrow, Dock 4, APPT-20260414-003, ~10:00 CST.

*Material:* LB-55001-A2 (Petroleum Distillate Lubricant) — 4 x 220L drums
*UN/DOT:* UN1268, Packing Group II, Class 3 Flammable Liquid
*SDS:* Rev 4 on file (last updated 02/15/2024). Supplier will include copy in packet.

I'll be at Dock 4 for the hazmat check-in. Per SOP Sec 17.1, I need to verify: SDS current, placards correct, manifest matches. @d.hooks please have the hazmat cage in Zone C prepped.
Zone C hazmat cage is clear and ready. Fork with hazmat-rated attachment staged at Dock 4.

:white_check_mark: *Hazmat Receipt Complete — REC-20260414-003*

Meridian Lube delivery accepted at Dock 4 at 10:12 CST. All clear:
• 4 drums LB-55001-A2 received — exact count, Tier 0 condition (no leaks, no label damage)
• UN1268 Class 3 placards correct on all 4 drums and on truck
• SDS Rev 4 (02/15/2024) verified against our file copy — no change
• Hazmat manifest signed and filed
• Drums transferred to Zone C hazmat cage

SOP Sec 17.1 check complete. No issues. @k.whitfield — you can close this receipt out.

C007.text:
:calendar: *Dock Appointments — Week of April 14, 2026*

Monday 04/14:
• 07:00 Dock 2 — Lakewood/XPO (AX/FG, SC, DTL) :warning:
• 08:00 Dock 1 — Hartwell/Old Dominion (BG/SL)
• 10:00 Dock 4 — Meridian Lube/local (*HAZMAT*) :biohazard_sign:
• 11:00 Dock 3 — Appalachian Seal/UPS (*NEW SUPPLIER*) :new:

Tuesday 04/15:
• 09:00 Dock 1 — Delta Metals/Estes (*OVERSIZE/HEAVY, crane required*) :crane:

Full week view in dock_schedule.xlsx. Special handling flags are set — @d.hooks please confirm crane availability for Tuesday.
Crane confirmed for Tuesday 08:45 at Dock 1. Operator Mike Stills. I need piece weight from Estes/Delta tonight — @c.wojciechowski can you get us the lift specs?
Requested from Estes — will post here when I hear back.
Got it from Estes — Delta Metals shipment: 3 lifts, heaviest piece ~2,200 lb. Mike has the sheet.

:calendar: *Dock Update — Thursday April 23, 2026*

• Dock 1 — GreatLakes/FedEx Freight ETA ~10:00 — 12x TR-67801-D1 balance (MER-PO-104874). COC already received. Clean receipt expected.
• Dock 1 — Delta Metals/Estes oversize still pending reschedule after crane ops from 04/15. Will update when confirmed.

No hazmat today. No new-supplier arrivals.

:rotating_light: *No-Appointment Truck — 09:47 — Yellow Freight*
Carrier claiming delivery of TR-67801-D1 for PO MER-PO-104874 with no dock appointment. Held at dock entrance per SOP Sec 8.6 — *no bay door assigned, no unloading*. Carrier authorization status unverified. Investigation in progress. APPT-20260423-002 (FedEx Freight, same PO) still on schedule for today. Stand by for further direction. @d.hooks please keep Dock 1 clear until resolved.
